title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 295.190 - Governor to prescribe rules and regulations
text:
295.190.  Governor to prescribe rules and regulations. — The governor is authorized to prescribe the necessary rules and regulations to carry out the provisions of this chapter.
(L. 1947 V. I p. 358 § 20) 
Rules and regulations, where filed, effective date, Chap. 536
